tools.name: nh.getNhArt
tools.description: Get a list of all artwork and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhArtArtwork
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific artwork in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhBugs
tools.description: Get a list of all bugs and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhBugsBug
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific bug in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhClothing
tools.description: Get a list of all clothing items and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhClothingClothing
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific clothing item in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhEvents
tools.description: Get a list of events and dates in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*, filterable to specific years, months, or days. Data is available for the current and next year.

tools.name: nh.getNhFish
tools.description: Get a list of all fish and their details in *New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFishFish
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific fish in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFossilsAll
tools.description: Get a list of all the fossil groups with their respective individual fossils in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFossilsAllFossil
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific fossil group with their respective individual fossils in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFossilsGroups
tools.description: Get a list of all the fossil groups in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFossilsGroupsFossilGroup
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific fossil group in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFossilsIndividuals
tools.description: Get a list of all the individual fossils in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFossilsIndividualsFossil
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific individual fossil in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFurniture
tools.description: Get a list of all furniture and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhFurnitureFurniture
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific furniture in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhInterior
tools.description: Get a list of all interior items (flooring, wallpaper, and rugs) and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhInteriorItem
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific interior item in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhItems
tools.description: Get a list of all miscellaneous items (such as materials, star fragments, fruits, fences, and plants) and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhItemsItem
tools.description: Retrieve information about a miscellaneous item (such as materials, star fragments, fruits, fences, and plants) in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhPhotos
tools.description: Get a list of all character photos+posters and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhPhotosItem
tools.description: Retrieve information about a character photo or poster in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhRecipes
tools.description: Get a list of all recipes and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhRecipesItem
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific recipe in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhSea
tools.description: Get a list of all sea creatures and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhSeaSeaCreature
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific sea creature in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhTools
tools.description: Get a list of all tools and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: nh.getNhToolsTool
tools.description: Retrieve information about a specific tool in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

tools.name: villagers.getVillagers
tools.description: This endpoint retrieves villager information from the entire *Animal Crossing* series, with the option to filter by species, personality, game, and/or birthday. Filters use the AND operator (e.g. asking for villagers who have species `frog` and personality `smug` will return all smug frogs). Note that villagers only include the animals that act as residents. Special characters, such as Tom Nook and Isabelle, are not accessed through this endpoint.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
